text_block_list.name: Air Groove
choice_data_list: We'll get first place next time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
choice_data_list: We'll get first place next time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes, the result itself isn't so bad.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: However, I'm not satisfied with my performance.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I need to be an example for all Umamusume. In
order to do that, I need to aim ever higher.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That is all I have to say.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I don't need you to tell me that. I already know.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If I allow myself to be satisfied with these results,
I am not worthy of the title of Empress.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Once we return, we'll go over the race and devise
a new training plan.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
There's not a moment to waste. I could name at
least a dozen mistakes we need to address.
